name: Mamaw's Cheese Ball
directions: Mix all ingredients together and form into a ball.
Serving options for buffet table: Roll in chopped pecans.
Shape into a ring and fill ring with raspberry or strawberry preserves.
Shape into a log and sprinkle with parsley and paprika.
Serve with assorted crackers.

name: Jill's Cheese Ball
directions: Mix all ingredients together and whip with electric mixer, Chill for 2 to 4 hours. When chilled roll in pecans. Serve at room temperture.

name: Creamy  Cheese Ball
directions: Combine cream cheese and Blue cheese. Cream well. Blend in coconut, onion and Worcestershire sauce. Cover and chill for at least 6 hours or until ready to use.
Shortly before serving time, combine remaining ingredients on a piece of wax paper.
Form cheese mixture into ball and roll in the coconut, pecan, parsley mixture until completely covered.
Place on a platter; surround with crackers.

name: Mexican Cheese Ball
directions: Knead together Velveeta, cream cheese, garlic powder and Worcestershire sauce.
Roll in pecans and sprinkle with chili powder.
Optional: Put a touch of chili powder in the cheese mixture.
Serve with crackers.

name: Cheddar Cheese Balls
directions: Bring the cheese and margarine to room temperature. Add milk, green onions pimiento, Worcestershire sauce and hot pepper sauce. Beat and combine.
Cover and chill for 24 hours.
Shape mixture into a ball. Foll in parsley or nuts. Let stand for 15 minutes.
Serve with crackers. Makes 1 1/2 cup spread.
41 cal 4 g total fat.

name: Maria 's Cheese Ball
directions: In an electric food processor or blender, combine cream cheese, garlic, Worcestershire sauce and hot pepper sauce. Blend well.
Add cheddar cheese and process until the cheddar is fine, but still very visible.
Shape the mixture into balls or logs. Wrap individually in plastic wrap and place in the freezer.
While the balls are in the freezer, combine the ground pecans and parsley in a shallow bowl.
Remove the balls from the freezer and roll them in the pecan and parsley mixture.

name: Southern Cheese Ball
directions: Mix all ingredients together, except for pecans, to make 2 softball size balls or one large ball.
Roll balls in pecans to cover completely.
Refrigerate until ready to eat.

name: Nadine's Cheese Ball
directions: Combine all ingredients except pecans, and shape into a ball.
Roll cheese ball in chopped nuts.

name: Pimento and Jalapeno Cheese
directions: If all the ingredients won't fit in your food processor, scale the recipe down.
Process the cream cheese, and everything after it by pulsing 5 to 6 times or to desired consistency.
Place in a bowl.  Add cheese.  Blend well.
Cover and chill up to 1 day.
Serve with crackers or bread.  Nice for tea sandwiches.
